deployment._fee_recipient_notes: SPL Token native 2-of-3 multisigs (program TokenkegQ...). Same 3 signers on both networks: 5DLR6E2VpNsgpnyau1NidACdjGhUBxe2ABxhR4LYonSs, 3ARombQeRwqRpSs9VxzWFFb6exVUQnSEHfUnu9dhaftU, Ap5me949eqhcjdVg5fTN6Bm866aTLQhkMSw5gS66NsRN. Their WSOL ATAs already exist and are funded — distribute_sol_fees will route WSOL deposits to them. 2 of 3 sigs required to spend the accumulated WSOL.
deployment._protocol_admin_notes: MAINNET protocol admin / BPF upgrade authority = ixQ7TC6ENzVV8Qzdi6xUu5Pm6Pefg42772cqq8EfjBE (Squads multisig). Two distinct roles, both rotate to this address post-deploy: (1) BPF upgrade authority — controls program redeploys; rotate via `solana program set-upgrade-authority <PROGRAM_ID> --new-upgrade-authority ixQ7TC...`. (2) global_config.ext_authority — controls admin ixs (update_config, update_fees, set_pause, etc.); rotate via 2-step `update_config(new_authority = ixQ7TC...)` then have Squads accept_authority. Devnet keeps the deployer wallet (DdktaCvL...) as admin for cranker convenience.

token.name: degenBTC
token.description: Casino-speed country wars where SOL bets mine degenBTC and wake up on-chain HashBeasts.

marketplace._notes: fee_bps_default applies to BOTH P2P listings and program (inventory) listings. Admin can change post-init via update_marketplace_config. min_price_lamports protects against fat-finger 0-price listings. crank_authority owns the inventory disposition cranker — separate from program admin so cranks can rotate independently.

hashbeasts_config._supply_plan: 36K genesis mint cap via bonding curve (3000 per configured country, 12 countries). No lifetime supply cap — breeding is admin-gated and price-curved instead of hard-capped.
hashbeasts_config._pricing_notes: Genesis curve_a = 2_935_780 anchors mint #36000 at about 4.20 SOL: 1.00 → 4.20 SOL, avg ~2.919 SOL, ~105,083 SOL total raise at full sellout (~$9.46M at SOL=$90). Formula: price(n) = base_price + curve_a · floor(n^(2/3)). Breeding uses max(parent breed-count table, 1.5x floor anchor), paid 50% SOL / 50% degenBTC.

hashbeasts.collection_description: Casino-speed country wars meet evolving NFT beasts. Hashbeasts mutate, breed, rebirth, and help players mine degenBTC on Solana.

tax._notes: Splits sum need not be 100; the residual (100 - faction_treasury - burn) flows back to the mining vault. NFT market making is now funded from SOL — see global sol_fee_config.nft_market_making_pct, default 3%.
